testcase.name: test_msme_sessions

failure.message: AssertionError: got: ['id', 'client_id', 'name', 'fy', 'scope', 'source_filename', 'payments_filename', 'generated_by', 'created_at', 'has_yearend', 'has_profiles', 'has_payments', 'has_results', 'yearend_count', 'profile_count', 'payment_count'] assert None == 'consolidation' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3133cf1e40>('scope_kind') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3133cf1e40> = {'client_id': 'cli_c5d02541264c', 'created_at': '2026-05-07T16:55:02.207342+00:00', 'fy': '2099-00', 'generated_by': 'QA Bot', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_c2_smoke.py:114: in test_msme_sessions assert d.get("scope_kind") == "consolidation", f"got: {list(d.keys())}" E AssertionError: got: ['id', 'client_id', 'name', 'fy', 'scope', 'source_filename', 'payments_filename', 'generated_by', 'created_at', 'has_yearend', 'has_profiles', 'has_payments', 'has_results', 'yearend_count', 'profile_count', 'payment_count'] E assert None == 'consolidation' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3133cf1e40>('scope_kind') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3133cf1e40> = {'client_id': 'cli_c5d02541264c', 'created_at': '2026-05-07T16:55:02.207342+00:00', 'fy': '2099-00', 'generated_by': 'QA Bot', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_msme_list_exposes_scope_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: missing key scope_kind in MSME session_summary; have ['id', 'client_id', 'name', 'fy', 'scope', 'source_filename', 'payments_filename', 'generated_by', 'created_at', 'has_yearend', 'has_profiles', 'has_payments', 'has_results', 'yearend_count', 'profile_count', 'payment_count'] assert 'scope_kind' in {'client_id': 'cli_c5d02541264c', 'created_at': '2026-05-07T16:55:02.207342+00:00', 'fy': '2099-00', 'generated_by': 'QA Bot', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_c2_smoke.py:128: in test_msme_list_exposes_scope_fields assert k in row, f"missing key {k} in MSME session_summary; have {list(row.keys())}" E AssertionError: missing key scope_kind in MSME session_summary; have ['id', 'client_id', 'name', 'fy', 'scope', 'source_filename', 'payments_filename', 'generated_by', 'created_at', 'has_yearend', 'has_profiles', 'has_payments', 'has_results', 'yearend_count', 'profile_count', 'payment_count'] E assert 'scope_kind' in {'client_id': 'cli_c5d02541264c', 'created_at': '2026-05-07T16:55:02.207342+00:00', 'fy': '2099-00', 'generated_by': 'QA Bot', ...}
